name: pokeweek
description: PokeWeek - a Gen 2 faithful online multiplayer Pokemon battle game

scripts.build:all: node scripts/build-data.mjs && node scripts/build-learnsets.mjs && node scripts/download-sprites.mjs && node scripts/build-characters.mjs && node scripts/build-tiles.mjs && node scripts/build-world.mjs
scripts.test: node scripts/test-mechanics.mjs && node scripts/test-online.mjs && node scripts/test-ws.mjs && node scripts/test-lobby.mjs && node scripts/test-presence.mjs && node scripts/test-week.mjs && node scripts/test-tournament.mjs
